preparations: Lenticula arrhiza is not recognized as a valid botanical name. However, I can provide information on Lentinula edodes, also known as shiitake mushroom. Herbal preparations of Lentinula edodes have been traditionally used in Asian medicine to boost the immune system and support overall health. The mushroom is often used in teas, soups, and supplements. In modern herbalism, Lentinula edodes is valued for its potential to stimulate the production of interferon, a protein that helps to fight off viral infections.
